basic_details.job_title: WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham (WCD Kabirdham) IT Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website www.kawardha.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Up to 45 years for Chhattisgarh residents as per state rules.

qualification.details: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field from a recognized university. Proficiency in MS Office and Computer Typing. Minimum 3 years of experience in data management/web-based reporting in government/semi-government organizations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kawardha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
